pass_condition: At least one institutional colleague reviewer or pilot analyst is named with role and date.
notes: Cannot use placeholder owner or anonymous internal author.

pass_condition: Colleague uses the release packet and operator runbook without live explanation from original author.
notes: Tests whether the workflow is transferable rather than memory-dependent.

pass_condition: Colleague reproduces at least one existing validation case action label with evidence-log and expectation-map checks.
notes: Use LLY/CRM/ETN/VRT or one historical case after G04/G06 clear.

pass_condition: Colleague starts one new case or approved follow-through refresh using the workflow artifacts.
notes: Does not clear G04 unless the later-event refresh validator also passes.

pass_condition: Colleague confirms source gaps, stale_after and must_refresh_if fields are visible enough to maintain.
Colleague can explain the action label, stop rule and what evidence would change the conclusion.
Colleague reviews practice-falsification-audit.csv and confirms claims are case-grounded or flags ungrounded claims.
Colleague reviews methodology-iteration-trace-audit.csv and confirms workflow patches trace to case failures or flags overfit patches.
notes: Must not accept memory-based or theory-only method changes.

pass_condition: Release owner archives a dated colleague acceptance memo with residual caveats and refresh conditions.
notes: Required before final institutional colleague release.
